ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drug_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug being reviewed */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition for which the drug is used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "useful_count" INTEGER /* Count of users who found the review useful */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Detailed list of side effects experienced by the user */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of how effective the drug was for the user */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the drug taken by the user */,
  "duration_of_use" TEXT /* Duration of use of the drug */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_reviews_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_reviews_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drug */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the drug was approved */,
  "generic_name" TEXT /* Generic name of the drug */,
  "active_ingredients" TEXT /* Active ingredients in the drug */,
  "fda_approval_status" TEXT /* Whether the drug is FDA-approved */,
  "prescription_required" INTEGER /* Whether the drug requires a prescription */,
  "common_side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects associated with the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical condition */,
  "prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence of the condition */,
  "common_drugs" TEXT /* Commonly prescribed drugs for the condition */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., patient, healthcare professional) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture URL */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "useful_counts" (
  "useful_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each useful count */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review that was found useful */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who found the review useful */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Optional comment from the user who found the review useful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("useful_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_useful_counts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_useful_counts_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES drug_reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drug category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES drug_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the drug belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES drug_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_category_mapping_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review that was modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the modification */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date the modification was made */,
  "reason_for_modification" TEXT /* Reason for the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_modifications_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES drug_reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_modifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
